CREATE TABLE urls (url_id INT PRIMARY KEY, url_string CLOB);
SELECT sys.getcontext(url_string) FROM urls WHERE url_id = 1;
SELECT sys.getcontext(url_string) FROM urls WHERE url_id IN (2, 3);
SELECT sys.getcontext(url_string) FROM urls WHERE url_id IN (SELECT url_id FROM urls WHERE url_string LIKE 'http%');
SELECT u.url_string, sys.getcontext(u.url_string) AS context FROM urls u WHERE LENGTH(u.url_string) > 30;
SELECT u.url_id, sys.getcontext(u.url_string) FROM urls u WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM urls WHERE url_id = u.url_id AND url_string LIKE 'https%');
CREATE TABLE url_responses (response_id INT PRIMARY KEY, url_id INT, response CLOB, FOREIGN KEY (url_id) REFERENCES urls(url_id));
INSERT INTO url_responses VALUES (1, 1, 'Response from example.com');
INSERT INTO url_responses VALUES (2, 2, 'Response from subdomain.example.com');
SELECT u.url_string, r.response FROM urls u JOIN url_responses r ON u.url_id = r.url_id WHERE sys.getcontext(u.url_string) IS NOT NULL;
